chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 41 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.206/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.207/2026 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 13.01.2026 Mr. Khursheed Anwar Khosa, Advocate along with applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Urgency is allowed; however, learned Counsel for the applicant requires that fresh bail application is to be filed having proper particulars therein as according to him inadvertently copy-paste job has come up in the matter. Accordingly, present bail application stands disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
